name: Hippo Campus
description: Indie rock band Hippo Campus returns to their hometown for a sold-out show at First Avenue.

name: Comedy Open Mic Night
description: Weekly open mic night featuring local comedians. Free admission with two-drink minimum.

name: Timberwolves vs. Lakers
description: Minnesota Timberwolves take on the Los Angeles Lakers in regular season NBA action.

name: Hamlet
description: The Guthrie's acclaimed production of Shakespeare's Hamlet runs through April.

name: DJ Nite at Uptown VFW
description: Electronic and house music all night. No cover before 11pm.

name: Minneapolis Farmers Market
address: 312 E Lyndale Ave N, Minneapolis, MN
description: Early spring market with local produce, baked goods, and artisan crafts.

name: Walker Art Center: New Exhibit Opening
description: Opening day for the Walker's new contemporary photography exhibition featuring emerging Midwest artists.

name: Salsa Night
description: Live salsa band and open dance floor. Beginner lesson at 8pm.

name: The Cactus Blossoms
address: 1601 University Ave W, St Paul, MN
description: Minneapolis duo The Cactus Blossoms bring their vintage country harmonies to the Turf Club.

name: Wild vs. Avalanche
address: 199 W Kellogg Blvd, St Paul, MN
description: Minnesota Wild face the Colorado Avalanche in a crucial late-season matchup.

name: Sunday Jazz Brunch
description: Live jazz trio accompanies brunch at the legendary 331 Club in Northeast.

name: Candlelight: Tribute to Prince
description: A string quartet performs Prince's greatest hits by candlelight at Orchestra Hall.
